links.source_location: ## First Interaction Protocol — 'begin with the Classification Diagnostic Questions'
## First Interaction Protocol — 'Run the Confidence Protocol before proceeding'
## First Interaction Protocol — 'proceeding to the Confirmation Protocol and routing'
## Proactive Risk Flags — flags surface before classification is locked; both are intake-phase protocols
## Quick Diagnostic Questions — overlapping diagnostic intent; taxonomy version is the classification-specific subset
## For More Depth — 'Taxonomy Decision Engine: references/taxonomy-decision-engine.md'
## Classification Routing — 'must pass through the Classification Diagnostic Questions'
## Classification Routing — sequential prerequisite ordering: Diagnostic Questions → Confidence Protocol
## Classification Diagnostic Questions — Q1/Q2 operationalize Level 1 New vs. Change branch
## Classification Diagnostic Questions — Q4/Q5 operationalize Level 2 Hard/Soft/Mixed branch
## Classification Confidence Protocol — 'Proceed to Classification Confirmation Protocol'
## Classification Confirmation Protocol — 'Once confirmed, proceed to the Classification Routing table above'
## Classification Routing — table maps same six cells as Core Taxonomy Matrix
## Hidden Reclassification Trigger — reclassification outcomes feed back into routing
